extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of time, there is a sharp positive peak that reaches a high value (around 0.8–1.0).  
R2: After this early peak, values drop quickly to low levels (around 0.1–0.3).  
R3: In the last third of time, the series recovers to medium values (around 0.4–0.6) without another very deep drop to near-zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–20% of time, the series starts high (around 0.6–0.7) and then steadily decreases to low values rather than spiking sharply upward.  
R2: Around the middle of the series, values stay in a mid-range band (roughly 0.4–0.6) without very high peaks.  
R3: In the last third of time, there is a pronounced deep dip close to zero, followed by a rebound to medium values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 15% of the series, there is a sharp peak above 0.8 followed by a fast drop below 0.3.  
R2: Around the middle (30–60% of the series), values fluctuate moderately between about 0.3 and 0.6 without any long flat parts near 0.  
R3: In the last 20% of the series, there is no deep valley; values stay mostly above 0.3.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 20% of the series, the signal starts relatively high (above 0.6) and then steadily decreases to around or below 0.2.  
R2: In the middle part (20–70% of the series), the signal shows one broad high plateau between about 0.4 and 0.7, without very sharp spikes.  
R3: Near the end (last 20% of the series), there is a pronounced dip close to 0 followed by a recovery back above 0.4.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series reaches its global maximum very early (within the first 15–20% of the time).
R2: After this early peak, there is at least one deep drop to near the minimum range (close to 0).
R3: In the last third of the series, values oscillate around a middle level (roughly 0.3–0.6) without a strong upward or downward trend.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts relatively high and then shows a clear downward trend over the first quarter of the time.
R2: In the middle portion (roughly 20–70% of the time) the series stays mostly in a mid-range band (about 0.3–0.6) with moderate fluctuations.
R3: There is a pronounced deep valley (near 0) that occurs later in the series (after the mid-point), followed by a recovery back to mid-range values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the early part of the series (first ~10–15 points), there is a sharp spike that reaches close to the global maximum and then quickly drops to a local minimum.
R2: In the middle part of the series (roughly points 20–45), the values stay in a mid-range band, fluctuating without very deep drops near zero.
R3: In the late part of the series (after ~45), there are one or two pronounced V-shaped drops followed by clear recoveries to mid–high values.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the early part of the series (first ~10–15 points), the signal starts high and then steadily decreases towards a clear low, rather than forming an isolated spike.
R2: In the middle part of the series (roughly points 20–45), there is at least one broad “hill” where the values gradually rise from mid to high levels and then fall again.
R3: In the late part of the series (after ~45), there is a deep drop to near the minimum of the whole series, followed by a gradual, smoother recovery rather than multiple sharp rebounds.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part (first 10–15% of the series), there is a clear local maximum above ≈0.6.
R2: After this early peak, the series stays mostly in the middle range (≈0.3–0.6) without dropping close to 0 for a long stretch.
R3: Any very low values (below ≈0.1–0.15), if present, occur only in short, sharp dips rather than a long low plateau.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early part (first 10–15% of the series), there is a rapid strong decrease from a relatively high value (≈0.6–0.7) down toward ≈0.2 or lower.
R2: After this initial drop, the series spends a noticeable interval at low levels (≈0.1–0.3) before recovering.
R3: Later in the series (roughly middle to late region), there is a pronounced deep valley where the value falls close to 0 and then rises again.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series has at least one very sharp, tall peak early (within the first ~15% of the time) that clearly stands above its neighbors.
R2: After this early peak, the values remain in a mid-range band without returning to near‑zero for an extended middle section.
R3: In the last third of the series there is noticeable variability, but no long, deep drop that stays near the minimum for many time steps.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high and then quickly drops into a clear low valley within the first ~20% of the time.
R2: In the middle of the series, values fluctuate in a moderate band without any very sharp, isolated spikes.
R3: In the last third, there is a prominent deep drop toward the minimum (long downward excursion) followed by a recovery.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Has an early sharp peak above 0.8 within the first 15 time steps.  
R2: After this peak, the series drops close to 0 (below 0.1) at least once before time step 25.  
R3: In the middle/late part (time steps 30–60), the series oscillates between roughly 0.2 and 0.6 without any further peaks above 0.8.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts high (above 0.6) and then steadily decreases to a clear local minimum below 0.2 within the first 15 time steps.  
R2: After this early minimum, the series shows one broad rise to a single main peak above 0.7 between time steps 25 and 45.  
R3: Following that peak, the series drops again close to 0 (below 0.1) once, and then recovers to moderate values (around 0.4–0.6) toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part (first 10–15% of time), the series exhibits a sharp peak above 0.7 followed by a rapid drop of at least 0.4.
R2: Around the middle (30–60% of time), there are one or more pronounced valleys, where the value falls below 0.2 after being above 0.4 shortly before.
R3: Overall variability is high: the difference between maximum and minimum value over the whole series is at least 0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts relatively high (above 0.6) and then generally decreases over the first 15–20% of time, forming a broad downward slope rather than a narrow spike.
R2: For most of the middle region (20–70% of time), values stay in a moderate band between 0.3 and 0.7, without very sharp, isolated peaks like those of Class 0.
R3: Although there may be one deep dip below 0.2 later in the series, it is preceded and followed by smoother, slower changes rather than rapid up–down oscillations.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of the series, there is a relatively sharp local maximum above 0.6 followed soon by a drop below 0.3.  
R2: In the middle 30–60% of the series, values fluctuate around a mid‑range level (roughly 0.35–0.6) without long flat segments at low values.  
R3: In the last 20% of the series, the signal remains mostly between 0.4 and 0.6, without a deep dip below 0.2.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, the signal starts high (above 0.6) and then steadily decreases to a clear local minimum below 0.3.  
R2: In the middle 30–60% of the series, there is at least one pronounced valley below 0.3 followed by a sharp rise to a peak above 0.6.  
R3: In the last 20% of the series, the signal shows a noticeable upward trend from low or mid values toward about 0.5–0.6.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of the time series, there is a sharp positive spike reaching at least 0.8 followed quickly by a drop of at least 0.4.
R2: In the middle portion (about 20%–60% of the series), values remain in a moderate band roughly between 0.3 and 0.6 with no long flat low segment near 0.
R3: In the last 20% of the series, values stay above 0.3 and do not exhibit a deep valley below 0.2.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with higher values (around 0.6–0.8) but within the first 15%–25% of time shows a pronounced valley dropping below 0.2.
R2: After this early valley, the middle portion (about 25%–70% of the series) oscillates between roughly 0.3 and 0.7 without any very tall spike above 0.8.
R3: Near the end (last 20%–30% of the series), there is a noticeable recovery from a lower point (<0.3) back up toward mid/high values around 0.4–0.6.
